scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,storefront,shop -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w storefront" "npm run dev -w shop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w storefront && npm run build -w shop
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,storefront,shop -c blue,magenta,green "npm run start -w server" "npm run start -w storefront" "npm run start -w shop"
